disconnectSlackAccount.description: Title for the page where users can disconnect their PREreview profile from their Community Slack account.

youCanDisconnect.message: You can disconnect your PREreview profile from your account on the PREreview Community Slack.
youCanDisconnect.description: Text shown alongside the heading “Disconnect your Community Slack Account”.

removeOrcidId.message: We’ll remove your ORCID iD from your Slack profile.
removeOrcidId.description: Text shown alongside the heading “Disconnect your Community Slack Account”.

canReconnect.message: You will be able to reconnect it at any time.
canReconnect.description: Text shown alongside the heading “Disconnect your Community Slack Account”.

disconnectAccountButton.description: Button on the “Disconnect your Community Slack Account” page that disconnects the user’s PREreview profile from their Community Slack account.

havingProblems.description: Heading for the page shown when there are issues disconnecting the Community Slack account.

unableToDisconnect.message: We’re unable to disconnect your account right now.
unableToDisconnect.description: Text shown alongside the heading “Sorry, we’re having problems”.

tryAgainLater.description: Text shown alongside the heading “Sorry, we’re having problems”.
